headline: What JPMorgan Chase (JPM)'s Bigger Dividend, US$50B Buyback and New Co-Presidents Mean For Shareholders
summary: In late June 2026, JPMorgan Chase & Co. announced a planned increase in its quarterly common dividend to US$1.65 per share from US$1.50, alongside Board authorization for a new US$50.00 billion share repurchase program and several senior leadership changes, including appointing Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh as Co-Presidents. These capital return moves, paired with recent earnings that exceeded revenue and EPS expectations and ongoing analyst estimate upgrades, highlight how management is...
